name: American Express Platinum Reserve Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5X Membership Rewards on dining and entertainment spends
1 MR point per ₹50 on all other purchases

welcomeBenefits.description: 10,000 bonus MR points on spending ₹50,000 in first 90 days

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹25,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas

additionalBenefits: ITC hotel milestone vouchers worth up to ₹22,000 annually
MR points transferable to airline miles at up to 1:1 ratio
Amex Offers and exclusive merchant deals
pros: ITC hotel milestone vouchers worth up to ₹22,000/year
MR points transferable to airline miles at excellent ratios
Good lounge access with 8 domestic + 4 international visits
cons: Annual fee of ₹3,500 is moderate but not waivable easily
Amex acceptance still limited at some Indian merchants
Base earn rate of 1 MR/₹50 is low for this tier
ITC vouchers are useful only if you stay at ITC hotels
idealFor: ITC hotel loyalists who can maximize the milestone vouchers
Frequent diners and entertainment spenders who want premium Amex benefits

faqs.question: How do ITC milestone vouchers work?
faqs.answer: On spending ₹1,90,000 you get a ₹7,000 ITC hotel voucher, and on ₹4,00,000 spend you get an additional ₹15,000 voucher. These can be used at ITC Hotels, WelcomHotels, and Fortune Hotels.

faqs.question: Can I transfer MR points to airlines?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can transfer MR points to airline partners including Delta SkyMiles and other programs. The transfer ratio is typically 1 MR = 1 mile for select partners.

faqs.question: Is this card worth the ₹3,500 fee?
faqs.answer: If you spend enough to hit the ITC milestone benefits (₹1.9L gives ₹7,000 voucher), the card pays for itself multiple times over. The 5X dining rewards add further value.

faqs.question: How many lounge visits do I get?
faqs.answer: You get 8 complimentary domestic and 4 international lounge visits per year through the Amex Lounge Program and Priority Pass.
